stories.headline: Restaurants Revealed
stories.summary: Joel Grover discusses the impact of an investigative series on restaurant conditions in L.A., revealing widespread sanitary issues and prompting legal changes.

stories.headline: FREE BOAT TO CHINA All Expenses Paid
stories.summary: Gannett News Service conducted a database investigation revealing that private groups spent nearly $8 million on over 5,100 congressional trips between 1996-1997, with findings showing China as the top destination and the House Commerce Committee as the most frequent traveler.
